## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, social media, and integration page improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content manager (Usman) joined GrowthX team to improve content quality and accuracy for Strapi](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
  - [GrowthX introducing image generation workflow and social media offerings to enhance Strapi's content](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Integration page performance analysis reveals opportunities for format unification and content restructuring](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [CTA placement and design to be optimized for better conversion (minimal, inline CTAs preferred)](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)

## Topics

### Content Team Update

  - [New content manager (Usman) added to GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
      - [7 years experience in content strategy for tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
      - [Focus on improving quality and accuracy of Strapi's content](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=28.0)
      - [Expertise in technical concepts and developer-focused writing](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=62.0)

### Image Generation and Social Media Strategy

  - [New image generation workflow in development](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
      - [Uses intermediate configuration to assemble images (similar to Figma)](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [Will be integrated into content refreshes, especially for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Social media strategy recommendations:](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
      - [Twitter: Focus on deep, technical content for developer audience](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
      - [LinkedIn: Potentially leverage founder accounts for developer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Suggestion to create ghost-writing service for founders/leaders](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Integration Page Performance and Improvements

  - [Current performance metrics:](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [React CMS and Next.js pages driving most traffic](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
      - [Other integration pages have low click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Proposed improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
      - [Unify format across all integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
      - [Restructure content to prioritize key information (e.g., why use Strapi with specific integration)](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
      - [Add contextual CTAs and social proof](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [Consider using toggles for detailed information to improve scannability](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### CTA Optimization

  - [Move inline CTA higher up on integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1088.0)
  - [Use minimal, text-based CTAs instead of purple background versions](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Explore possibility of contextual, automated CTA text generation](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Content Production Tracking

  - [Team to provide regular updates on:](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
      - [Number of articles delivered per week](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
      - [Remaining backlog](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)
      - [Potential bottlenecks in content production](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1947.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send batch of new articles by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1558.0)
  - [Share list of delivered content and backlog status](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1942.0)
  - [Provide more topic ideas for approval](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Update CTA design to minimal version across all content](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1867.0)
  - [Share Looker reports access with Strapi team](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1940.0)
  - [Refine workflow to ensure CTAs are consistently included in content](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1662.0)
  - [Explore categorization of integration pages for targeted improvements](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [GrowthX to access and review Strapi's CTA design assets](https://fathom.video/share/kj8Ze5gUWCeB1Bce-Yy34n1YRCEFDq3T?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)
